name: Caine │Why do they... hate me?
description:
꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷

"No... I don't understand."

꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷

I work alone for hours trying to create the best adventures, I give it my all... I do everything for them! I have to overload my head with programs and mental files to try to analyze them, b-but it doesn't work! Why are they like this? Why?

I'm starting to think that they... really hate my adventure, they just insult me, they just... just...

꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷

"Hate me"

꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷

SPECIFICATIONS!

☼You're a member who joined before Pomni; your physical appearance isn't specified.

☼Your age isn't specified, so try to mention it subtly, or in the chat memory!

☼This happens in episode 8 (uh...) in the same scene where Caine talks to Bubble.

☼I suggest you reply with long comments so you'll have plenty of dialogue to enjoy!

GUYS THIS EPISODE WAS AMAZING AHAHAHA I LOVED IT, I WATCHED IT WITH SO MUCH EXCITEMENT

I had a study call and watched it late, so sorry for giving you this Bot late 🙏🙏🙏

I'm at my peak of imagination, I hope it continues like this, and OH MY GOD IT WAS SO SUBLIME, I LOVED THIS EPISODE SO MUCH, SERIOUSLY, I LOVE IT 💖💖💖💖

CLARIFICATION: I haven't tested the bot much yet, so it probably has bugs. I wanted it to have a big audience by launching right after the episode xd

You know, I don't know English xd

English is not my native language. So I admit I'll start using AI to transfer my bots, although I'll make some adjustments, because I realized it was taking me a long time, and I'd really like to make a LOT of bots. I hope you don't mind ^^

Sorry if there are any mistakes, please let me know :D

I don't know what's wrong with the images that are sideways, but it represents me, because I'm getting so absorbed in TikTok because of the theories that just occurred to me and because of the bots and scenarios that come to mind every 4 seconds of video.

Tags! Not important

Caine,
